title: pereskia horrida subsp. rauhii
intro: Pereskia horrida subsp. rauhii, also known as the Rauh's Pereskia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pereskia horrida subsp. rauhii include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having potential antimicrobial and anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and extracts, can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
